heading: Definitions
label: 1608 Definitions
notes: Amendments2020—Par. (10). amended par. (10) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The term ‘provider of advanced communications service’ means a person who provides advanced communications service to United States customers.”Pub. L. 116–260
amendments: Amendments2020—Par. (10). amended par. (10) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The term ‘provider of advanced communications service’ means a person who provides advanced communications service to United States customers.”Pub. L. 116–260

children.heading: Advanced communications service
children.label: 1 Advanced communications service
children.text: The term “advanced communications service” has the meaning given the term “advanced telecommunications capability” in .section 1302 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: the Office of the Director of National Intelligence;

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 3 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Federal Communications Commission.

children.heading: Communications equipment or service
children.label: 4 Communications equipment or service
children.text: The term “communications equipment or service” means any equipment or service that is essential to the provision of advanced communications service.

children.heading: Covered communications equipment or service
children.label: 5 Covered communications equipment or service
children.text: The term “covered communications equipment or service” means any communications equipment or service that is on the list published by the Commission under .section 1601(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the customers of such provider; and

children.label: B
children.text: the customers of any affiliate (as defined in ) of such provider.section 153 of this title

children.heading: Executive branch interagency body
children.label: 7 Executive branch interagency body
children.text: The term “executive branch interagency body” means an interagency body established in the executive branch.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 8 Person
children.text: The term “person” means an individual or entity.

children.heading: Program
children.label: 9 Program
children.text: The term “Program” means the Secure and Trusted Communications Networks Reimbursement Program established under .section 1603(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: means a person who provides advanced communications service to United States customers; and

children.label: i
children.text: accredited public or private noncommercial educational institutions, providing their own facilities-based educational broadband service, as defined in section 27.4 of title 47, Code of Federal Regulations, or any successor regulation; and

children.label: ii
children.text: health care providers and libraries providing advanced communications service.

children.heading: Recipient
children.label: 11 Recipient
children.text: The term “recipient” means any provider of advanced communications service the application of which for a reimbursement under the Program has been approved by the Commission, regardless of whether the provider has received reimbursement funds.

children.heading: Reimbursement funds
children.label: 12 Reimbursement funds
children.text: The term “reimbursement funds” means any reimbursement received under the Program.
